package rulecoverage

func NegativeDomainIdentifiersLoggedUnderInconsistentFieldKeys() string {
    ruleID := "domain_identifiers_logged_under_inconsistent_field_keys"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "The same entity ID being logged under many different keys across packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
